scripts.dev: node --env-file=.env -e "const { spawnSync } = require('node:child_process'); const env = { ...process.env, NODE_ENV: 'development', PORT: process.env.PORT || '3001' }; const build = spawnSync('corepack', ['pnpm', 'run', 'build'], { stdio: 'inherit', env, shell: true }); if (build.status !== 0) process.exit(build.status ?? 1); const start = spawnSync('corepack', ['pnpm', 'run', 'start'], { stdio: 'inherit', env, shell: true }); process.exit(start.status ?? 1);"
